# Futurion Solutions

> Futurion Solutions is a software company in Valencia, Spain, building private AI tools that run on infrastructure the customer controls: TrustPrompt (redacts personal data in the browser before it reaches AI services), TrustCore (on-device document Q&A), and TrustAuto (on-premises business process automation with compliance controls). We work with legal, compliance, finance and healthcare teams in Spain and the EU. We also deploy MedCore Private AI, an on-premise medical AI platform, and offer a free Automation Roadmap assessment.

## Key pages

- [Homepage (English)](https://solutions.futurion.es/): Overview of the private AI product line — TrustPrompt, TrustCore, TrustAuto — how it works, FAQ
- [Homepage (Spanish)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/): Spanish-language overview — IA privada para organizaciones reguladas
- [TrustPrompt](https://solutions.futurion.es/products/trustprompt/): Browser extension that redacts personal data before prompts leave the device
- [TrustPrompt (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/productos/trustprompt/): Página de TrustPrompt en español
- [TrustCore](https://solutions.futurion.es/products/trustcore/): On-device document Q&A — documents never leave the machine
- [TrustCore (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/productos/trustcore/): Página de TrustCore en español
- [TrustAuto](https://solutions.futurion.es/products/trustauto/): On-premises business process automation with compliance controls
- [TrustAuto (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/productos/trustauto/): Página de TrustAuto en español
- [Free Automation Roadmap](https://solutions.futurion.es/automation-roadmap/): Request the free automation and compliance assessment
- [Hoja de Ruta de Automatización (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/hoja-de-ruta-de-automatizacion/): Página de la hoja de ruta en español
- [MedCore Private AI](https://solutions.futurion.es/medcore-private-ai/): On-premise medical-grade AI infrastructure for medium healthcare organizations
- [MedCore IA Privada (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/medcore-ia-privada/): Spanish MedCore page
- [About](https://solutions.futurion.es/about/): About Futurion Solutions — team, mission, location (Valencia, Spain)
- [Nosotros (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/nosotros/): Spanish about page
- [Blog](https://solutions.futurion.es/blog/): Articles on healthcare AI compliance, GDPR, automation, and data privacy
- [Blog (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/blog/): Spanish-language blog
- [Contact](https://solutions.futurion.es/contact/): Contact form
- [Contacto (ES)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/contacto/): Formulario de contacto

## Blog articles (English)

- [GDPR Compliance for Growing Healthcare Providers: A Complete Guide](https://solutions.futurion.es/gdpr-compliance-small-healthcare-providers-guide/): 7 key GDPR requirements for dental clinics, pharmacies, and growing medical practices in Spain
- [5 Ways Dental Clinics Can Automate Workflows (While Staying Compliant)](https://solutions.futurion.es/dental-clinics-automate-workflows-compliance/): Specific automation use cases for dental practices under GDPR
- [Why Healthcare Needs On-Premise AI](https://solutions.futurion.es/why-healthcare-needs-on-premise-ai/): Data sovereignty and GDPR arguments for local AI deployment in healthcare
- [Why Hybrid AI Solutions Matter for Healthcare](https://solutions.futurion.es/why-hybrid-ai-solutions-matter-healthcare/): Architecture trade-offs between cloud, on-premise, and hybrid AI for healthcare
- [Introducing MedCore Private AI](https://solutions.futurion.es/introducing-medcore-private-ai/): Product introduction for the on-premise medical-grade AI platform
- [AI Agents in Healthcare: GDPR Risks Every Practice Owner Must Understand](https://solutions.futurion.es/ai-agents-healthcare-gdpr-risks/): MIT AI Agent Index 2025 analysis of GDPR risks from autonomous AI agents in healthcare
- [Subprocessor Review and Vendor Risk Management in EU Healthcare Organizations](https://solutions.futurion.es/gdpr-subprocessor-management-eu-healthcare/): Complete workflow for identifying, assessing, and managing third-party data processors under GDPR
- [5 Tasks Your Clinic Can Stop Doing Manually](https://solutions.futurion.es/5-tasks-clinic-stop-doing-manually/): Five highest-impact administrative workflows to automate first in independent healthcare practices
- [Consultant or Decision-Maker? How AI's Role Defines Clinical Accountability](https://solutions.futurion.es/consultant-or-decision-maker-ai-clinical-accountability/): 400-participant study on how AI system design shapes clinical accountability, safety, and regulatory compliance
- [Data Protection Impact Assessment in Healthcare AI](https://solutions.futurion.es/data-protection-impact-assessment-healthcare-ai/): Legal requirements and seven-step process for conducting DPIAs under GDPR Article 35 in healthcare
- [Hybrid AI in Healthcare: Why Compliance Defines Architecture](https://solutions.futurion.es/european-sovereign-cloud-healthcare-ai/): How AWS European Sovereign Cloud (EUSC) and on-premises GPU infrastructure enable GDPR-compliant hybrid AI for hospitals
- [Personalized Patient Treatment (PPT) Workflows in Healthcare: From Research to Real-World Automation](https://solutions.futurion.es/personalized-patient-treatment-workflows-healthcare/): How FHIR, openEHR, and governance-first workflow design enable safe healthcare personalization at scale
- [Healthcare Automation Must Be Built Differently](https://solutions.futurion.es/healthcare-automation-architecture/): Why responsible healthcare automation requires privacy-first architecture, role-based access, auditability, interoperability, and human accountability
- [Why OpenEvidence's EU/UK Withdrawal push Healthcare Toward Private On-prem or sovereign cloud](https://solutions.futurion.es/openevidence-eu-uk-withdrawal-private-on-prem-sovereign-cloud/): Why OpenEvidence's EU/UK withdrawal points clinical AI toward private on-premises and sovereign cloud architecture
- [Stop Pretending People Will Not Use AI](https://solutions.futurion.es/healthcare-ai-privacy-guardrails-presidio-openai-privacy-filter/): A guardrail is a privacy checkpoint that helps control what happens before data passes from one system to another
- [The AI Governance Playbook: Where to Start](https://solutions.futurion.es/ai-governance-playbook-where-to-start/): A practical starting point for enterprise AI governance — principles, ownership, the NIST AI RMF, lifecycle controls, and training
- [On-Prem Is Back — And This Time It's About Sovereignty](https://solutions.futurion.es/on-prem-is-back-ai-sovereignty/): American, Chinese, and European AI model blocks compared on cost, control, and jurisdiction — why on-premises infrastructure is returning

## Artículos del blog (Español)

- [Cumplimiento RGPD para Consultas Sanitarias en Crecimiento: Guía Completa](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-guia-cumplimiento-rgpd-consultas-sanitarias/): 7 requisitos clave del RGPD para clínicas dentales, farmacias y consultas médicas en España
- [5 Formas de Automatizar Flujos de Trabajo en Clínicas Dentales (Con Cumplimiento)](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-clinicas-dentales-automatizar-flujos-conformidad/): Casos de uso de automatización para clínicas dentales bajo el RGPD
- [Por Qué la Sanidad Necesita IA Local](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-por-que-sanidad-necesita-ia-local/): Argumentos de soberanía de datos y RGPD para el despliegue de IA local en sanidad
- [Por Qué las Soluciones de IA Híbridas Son Clave en Sanidad](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-soluciones-ia-hibridas-sanidad/): Comparativa de arquitecturas cloud, local e híbrida para sanidad
- [Presentamos MedCore Private AI](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-presentando-medcore-private-ai/): Introducción a la plataforma de IA médica de grado empresarial completamente local
- [Agentes IA en Sanidad: Riesgos RGPD que Debes Conocer](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-agentes-ia-sanidad-riesgos-rgpd/): Análisis del MIT AI Agent Index 2025 sobre riesgos RGPD de los agentes IA autónomos en sanidad
- [Revisión de Subprocesadores y Gestión de Riesgos de Proveedores en Organizaciones Sanitarias de la UE](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-revision-subprocesadores-gestion-riesgos-proveedores-rgpd/): Proceso completo para identificar, evaluar y gestionar subencargados del tratamiento bajo el RGPD
- [5 Tareas que tu Clínica Puede Dejar de Hacer Manualmente](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-5-tareas-clinica-dejar-hacer-manualmente/): Las cinco tareas administrativas de mayor impacto para automatizar primero en consultas sanitarias independientes
- [¿Consultora o decisora? Cómo el papel de la IA define la responsabilidad clínica](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-consultora-o-decisora-ia-responsabilidad-clinica/): Estudio con 400 participantes sobre cómo el diseño del sistema IA condiciona la seguridad, trazabilidad y cumplimiento normativo
- [Evaluación de Impacto en la Protección de Datos en la IA Sanitaria](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-eipd-evaluacion-impacto-proteccion-datos-ia-sanitaria/): Requisitos legales y proceso en siete pasos para realizar EIPDs bajo el Artículo 35 del RGPD en sanidad
- [IA híbrida en sanidad: por qué el cumplimiento normativo define la arquitectura](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-european-sovereign-cloud-ia-sanitaria/): Cómo AWS European Sovereign Cloud (EUSC) y la GPU local permiten IA híbrida conforme con el RGPD (LOPDGDD) para hospitales
- [Flujos de atención sanitaria personalizada: de la investigación a la automatización real](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-flujos-atencion-sanitaria-personalizada/): Cómo diseñar flujos personalizados con interoperabilidad FHIR, metodología openEHR y gobernanza orientada al cumplimiento
- [La automatización sanitaria debe construirse de otra manera](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-automatizacion-responsable/): Por qué la automatización sanitaria responsable requiere privacidad, permisos por rol, auditabilidad, interoperabilidad y responsabilidad humana
- [Por qué la retirada de OpenEvidence de la UE/Reino Unido empuja a la sanidad hacia soluciones on-premise o nube EU soberana](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-retirada-openevidence-ue-reino-unido-sanidad-on-premise-nube-soberana/): Por qué la retirada de OpenEvidence apunta a IA sanitaria on-premise, nube soberana y control de subencargados
- [Dejad de fingir que la gente no va a usar la IA](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-barreras-control-privacidad-ia-sanitaria-presidio-openai-privacy-filter/): La finalidad práctica de una barrera de control es sencilla: reducir la exposición innecesaria
- [La guía de gobernanza de IA: por dónde empezar](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-guia-gobernanza-ia-por-donde-empezar/): Un punto de partida práctico para la gobernanza de IA empresarial — principios, responsabilidad, el NIST AI RMF, controles del ciclo de vida y formación
- [Vuelve el on-premise: esta vez, por soberanía](https://solutions.futurion.es/es/es-vuelve-el-on-premise-soberania-ia/): Los bloques de modelos de IA americano, chino y europeo comparados en coste, control y jurisdicción — por qué vuelve la infraestructura local

## Key facts

- Location: Valencia, Spain
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Products: TrustPrompt (browser PII redaction), TrustCore (on-device document Q&A), TrustAuto (on-prem process automation), MedCore Private AI (on-premise medical AI)
- Target users: legal, compliance, finance and healthcare teams in Spain and the EU
- Compliance frameworks: GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, ISO 27001, AEPD (Spain)
- Free Automation Roadmap: no obligation, includes findings and prioritised recommendations
- Implementation pricing: €1,500–€3,000 (quick-win), €5,000–€15,000 (comprehensive)
- Monthly support: from €200/month
- Data architecture: on-premise and hybrid — customer data stays on customer infrastructure
- Contact: via contact form at https://solutions.futurion.es/contact/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/111621147/
